name: 20× SSC Buffer

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with HCl. Autoclave and store at room temperature. For Southern/Northern blot hybridization use 2×–6× SSC; for stringent washes use 0.1×–0.5× SSC. Also required for in situ hybridization (ISH).
notes.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.0。高压灭菌后室温保存。杂交 (Southern/Northern blot) 时使用 2×–6× SSC；严格洗膜用 0.1×–0.5× SSC。ISH (原位杂交) 也需要。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8765; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning
